LightningComponentBundle.description: Unified, modern Flow Screen visual picker. Configure via the built-in Custom Property Editor to source options from a picklist, a Flow record collection, a SOQL query, or a custom inline list.

propertyType.name: T
propertyType.label: Record type
propertyType.description: SObject type for record-backed data sources.

property.name: selectedLabel
property.label: Selected label (single)
property.description: Label text of the currently selected option. Useful for confirmation screens, email templates, and downstream logic.

property.name: selectedLabels
property.label: Selected labels (multi)
property.description: Label text for every currently selected option.

property.name: allValues
property.label: All rendered values
property.description: Every option value the picker rendered, in display order (post filter/sort/limit, including the None tile if enabled).

property.name: allLabels
property.label: All rendered labels
property.description: Every option label the picker rendered, in display order.

property.name: selectionCount
property.label: Selection count
property.description: Number of options the user has currently selected. 0 or 1 for single-select; 0–N for multi-select.
